'''R3-K8''' was an [[R3-series astromech droid/Legends|R3 astromech droid]] assigned to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. Assigned to the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] control room on the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was fitted with an [[R-Series Voice Box Adaptor|astromech voice box]] to facilitate communication between itself and the living controller on duty.

{{Droid-stub}}
